{# contacts.html — Vendor contacts tab with CRUD (add/edit/delete/set-primary). Receives: contacts (list[VendorContact]), vendor (VendorCard). Called by: vendor_tab_partial route (tab=="contacts") in htmx_views.py. Depends on: contact_row.html partial, HTMX, Alpine.js, brand palette. #}
